summary.en: Cameroon does not operate a directly equivalent of the EU RoHS directive as a standalone power-tool gate, but material safety is addressed through ANOR-adopted IEC safety requirements and any applicable chemical, import, and environmental rules administered within the PECAE conformity and import-inspection framework. To be honest about scope, the importer should confirm with ANOR whether a restricted-substances declaration is required for the specific product rather than assume an EU RoHS-style obligation.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆没有作为电动工具独立关卡、直接等同于欧盟 RoHS 指令的制度，但材料安全通过 ANOR 采用的 IEC 安全要求以及在 PECAE 符合性与进口检验框架内执行的任何适用化学、进口和环境规则处理。为如实界定范围，进口商应就具体产品向 ANOR 确认是否需要限用物质声明，而非假定存在欧盟 RoHS 式义务。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆沒有作為電動工具獨立關卡、直接等同於歐盟 RoHS 指令的制度，但材料安全通過 ANOR 採用的 IEC 安全要求以及在 PECAE 符合性與進口檢驗框架內執行的任何適用化學、進口和環境規則處理。為如實界定範圍，進口商應就具體產品向 ANOR 確認是否需要限用物質聲明，而非假定存在歐盟 RoHS 式義務。

standards_or_laws: ANOR-adopted IEC material-safety requirements within applicable NC standards
Cameroon chemical, import, and environmental rules administered through the PECAE programme where applicable
No confirmed standalone EU RoHS-equivalent product gate; confirm with ANOR per product

summary.en: China power-tool files commonly rely on the GB/T 3883 series for safety and may include China RoHS material declarations. This material evidence can support a Cameroon technical file, but it should be presented through the PECAE framework with French-language documentation rather than mapped to an assumed EU RoHS obligation.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常依赖 GB/T 3883 系列证明安全，并可能包含中国 RoHS 材料声明。这些材料证据可支持喀麦隆技术文件，但应通过 PECAE 框架配合法语文件呈交，而非映射到假定的欧盟 RoHS 义务。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常依賴 GB/T 3883 系列證明安全，並可能包含中國 RoHS 材料聲明。這些材料證據可支援喀麥隆技術文件，但應通過 PECAE 框架配合法語文件呈交，而非映射到假定的歐盟 RoHS 義務。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS material declarations where applicable

gap.en: The honest gap is uncertainty rather than a known failing: do not assert an EU RoHS-style Cameroon requirement that has not been confirmed. The practical action is to keep China RoHS and GB/T 3883 material evidence available, translate key declarations into French, and confirm with ANOR and the PECAE operator whether any restricted-substances declaration applies to the specific tool.
gap.zh: 如实的差距是不确定性，而非已知缺陷：不要主张尚未确认的欧盟 RoHS 式喀麦隆要求。实务动作是保留中国 RoHS 与 GB/T 3883 材料证据，将关键声明译为法语，并就具体工具向 ANOR 及 PECAE 运营方确认是否适用任何限用物质声明。
gap.zht: 如實的差距是不確定性，而非已知缺陷：不要主張尚未確認的歐盟 RoHS 式喀麥隆要求。實務動作是保留中國 RoHS 與 GB/T 3883 材料證據，將關鍵聲明譯為法語，並就具體工具向 ANOR 及 PECAE 運營方確認是否適用任何限用物質聲明。

target.en: No confirmed standalone EU RoHS-equivalent mandatory product gate is known for Cameroon power tools; material safety flows through ANOR-adopted IEC requirements and applicable import or chemical rules. Confirm any restricted-substances obligation with ANOR for the specific product.
target.zh: 未发现喀麦隆电动工具有已确认的独立、等同欧盟 RoHS 的强制产品关卡；材料安全通过 ANOR 采用的 IEC 要求及适用进口或化学规则处理。任何限用物质义务应就具体产品向 ANOR 确认。
target.zht: 未發現喀麥隆電動工具有已確認的獨立、等同歐盟 RoHS 的強制產品關卡；材料安全通過 ANOR 採用的 IEC 要求及適用進口或化學規則處理。任何限用物質義務應就具體產品向 ANOR 確認。

cn.en: China baseline uses GB/T 3883 for safety and may add China RoHS material declarations.
cn.zh: 中国基线采用 GB/T 3883 证明安全，并可能附加中国 RoHS 材料声明。
cn.zht: 中國基線採用 GB/T 3883 證明安全，並可能附加中國 RoHS 材料聲明。

source.publisher: Agence des Normes et de la Qualite (ANOR), Cameroon

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed EU RoHS-equivalent Cameroon gate applies, so the honest position is to retain China material evidence in French and confirm with ANOR whether any restricted-substances declaration is required, rather than claim or assume an obligation that has not been verified.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未确认有等同欧盟 RoHS 的喀麦隆关卡适用，故如实立场是以法语保留中国材料证据，并向 ANOR 确认是否需要任何限用物质声明，而非主张或假定尚未核实的义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未確認有等同歐盟 RoHS 的喀麥隆關卡適用，故如實立場是以法語保留中國材料證據，並向 ANOR 確認是否需要任何限用物質聲明，而非主張或假定尚未核實的義務。

summary.en: Cameroon does not operate an equivalent of the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 as a standalone product gate, so cordless power-tool batteries are handled through ANOR-adopted IEC battery safety requirements, lithium-battery transport rules, and any import controls within the PECAE framework. Where the cordless tool contains a radio function, ART approval remains a separate gate. To be honest about scope, there is no Cameroon battery passport, due-diligence, or removability marking obligation comparable to the EU regime.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆没有作为独立产品关卡、等同于欧盟电池法规 2023/1542 的制度，因此无绳电动工具电池通过 ANOR 采用的 IEC 电池安全要求、锂电池运输规则及 PECAE 框架内的任何进口管制处理。若无绳工具含无线电功能，ART 批准仍是单独关卡。为如实界定范围，喀麦隆没有可与欧盟制度相比的电池护照、尽职调查或可拆卸标识义务。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆沒有作為獨立產品關卡、等同於歐盟電池法規 2023/1542 的制度，因此無繩電動工具電池通過 ANOR 採用的 IEC 電池安全要求、鋰電池運輸規則及 PECAE 框架內的任何進口管制處理。若無繩工具含無線電功能，ART 批准仍是單獨關卡。為如實界定範圍，喀麥隆沒有可與歐盟制度相比的電池護照、盡職調查或可拆卸標識義務。

standards_or_laws: ANOR-adopted IEC battery safety requirements for portable batteries used in cordless tools
Lithium-battery transport and import rules (UN 38.3 transport basis) where applicable
ART approval for cordless tools with radio functions
No confirmed EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 equivalent; confirm with ANOR per product

summary.en: China tool files often treat the battery pack as an accessory tested with the tool under GB/T 3883, plus separate lithium-battery safety and UN 38.3 transport evidence. For Cameroon this evidence is generally usable as the technical basis, but it should be carried through the PECAE framework with French-language documentation, and any radio function checked against ART.
summary.zh: 中国工具文件通常将电池包作为随工具按 GB/T 3883 测试的附件，并附单独的锂电池安全与 UN 38.3 运输证据。对喀麦隆而言，这些证据一般可作为技术依据使用，但应通过 PECAE 框架配合法语文件呈交，任何无线电功能须对照 ART 检查。
summary.zht: 中國工具文件通常將電池包作為隨工具按 GB/T 3883 測試的附件，並附單獨的鋰電池安全與 UN 38.3 運輸證據。對喀麥隆而言，這些證據一般可作為技術依據使用，但應通過 PECAE 框架配合法語文件呈交，任何無線電功能須對照 ART 檢查。

standards_or_laws: China lithium battery safety and UN 38.3 transport evidence where applicable

gap.en: The honest gap is the opposite of the EU lane: there is no confirmed Cameroon battery-marking or battery-passport obligation to satisfy, so the action is to keep the IEC battery safety and UN 38.3 transport evidence available in French, confirm any import or chemical condition with the PECAE operator, and clear ART for cordless radio tools. Do not assert an EU Battery-Regulation-style Cameroon requirement that has not been verified.
gap.zh: 如实的差距与欧盟通道相反：没有需满足的已确认喀麦隆电池标识或电池护照义务，故动作是以法语保留 IEC 电池安全与 UN 38.3 运输证据，向 PECAE 运营方确认任何进口或化学条件，并为无绳无线电工具完成 ART 放行。不要主张尚未核实的欧盟电池法规式喀麦隆要求。
gap.zht: 如實的差距與歐盟通道相反：沒有需滿足的已確認喀麥隆電池標識或電池護照義務，故動作是以法語保留 IEC 電池安全與 UN 38.3 運輸證據，向 PECAE 運營方確認任何進口或化學條件，並為無繩無線電工具完成 ART 放行。不要主張尚未核實的歐盟電池法規式喀麥隆要求。

target.en: No confirmed EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 equivalent is known for Cameroon; battery safety flows through ANOR-adopted IEC requirements and transport or import rules, with ART approval for radio functions. Confirm any battery-specific obligation with ANOR for the specific product.
target.zh: 未发现喀麦隆有等同欧盟电池法规 2023/1542 的已确认制度；电池安全通过 ANOR 采用的 IEC 要求及运输或进口规则处理，无线电功能须经 ART 批准。任何电池专项义务应就具体产品向 ANOR 确认。
target.zht: 未發現喀麥隆有等同歐盟電池法規 2023/1542 的已確認制度；電池安全通過 ANOR 採用的 IEC 要求及運輸或進口規則處理，無線電功能須經 ART 批准。任何電池專項義務應就具體產品向 ANOR 確認。

cn.en: China tool and battery evidence uses GB/T 3883 plus lithium-battery safety and UN 38.3 transport documentation.
cn.zh: 中国工具与电池证据采用 GB/T 3883 加锂电池安全及 UN 38.3 运输文件。
cn.zht: 中國工具與電池證據採用 GB/T 3883 加鋰電池安全及 UN 38.3 運輸文件。

source.publisher: Agence des Normes et de la Qualite (ANOR), Cameroon

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed EU Battery-Regulation-equivalent Cameroon gate applies to cordless tool batteries, so the honest position is to retain IEC battery safety and UN 38.3 transport evidence in French, clear ART for any radio function, and confirm with ANOR whether any battery-specific obligation exists, rather than assume an EU-style duty.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未确认有等同欧盟电池法规的喀麦隆关卡适用于无绳工具电池，故如实立场是以法语保留 IEC 电池安全与 UN 38.3 运输证据、为任何无线电功能完成 ART 放行，并向 ANOR 确认是否存在任何电池专项义务，而非假定欧盟式义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未確認有等同歐盟電池法規的喀麥隆關卡適用於無繩工具電池，故如實立場是以法語保留 IEC 電池安全與 UN 38.3 運輸證據、為任何無線電功能完成 ART 放行，並向 ANOR 確認是否存在任何電池專項義務，而非假定歐盟式義務。
